name: Bifrost Gateway
description: Registers a local Bifrost AI Gateway OpenAI-compatible server as a first-party chat provider using configured model IDs.

env.description: Optional fallback loopback Bifrost OpenAI-compatible base URL. Defaults to http://localhost:8080/v1.
Optional fallback Bifrost bearer token, provider API key, or virtual key used for inference when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.
Optional fallback Bifrost bearer token used for inference when no api_key Plugin Setting or BIFROST_API_KEY is configured.
Optional fallback Bifrost virtual key used for inference when no api_key Plugin Setting, BIFROST_API_KEY, or BIFROST_TOKEN is configured.
Optional comma-separated Bifrost model IDs exposed by the local gateway when no model_ids Plugin Setting is configured.

settings.label: Bifrost Gateway base URL
settings.description: Loopback OpenAI-compatible base URL for Bifrost Gateway. Defaults to http://localhost:8080/v1 and is restricted by the plugin to localhost, 127.0.0.1, or ::1 URLs with either /v1 or /openai/v1 routes.

settings.label: Bifrost API key or token
settings.description: Optional Bifrost bearer token, provider API key, or virtual key. Falls back to BIFROST_API_KEY, BIFROST_TOKEN, and then BIFROST_VIRTUAL_KEY.

settings.label: Bifrost model IDs
settings.description: Model IDs to expose for the local Bifrost Gateway. Use provider-prefixed IDs returned by /v1/models or configured aliases. Falls back to comma-separated BIFROST_MODEL_IDS.

providers.name: Bifrost Gateway
providers.description: Registers configured local Bifrost Gateway OpenAI-compatible chat models and serves them through Pi's OpenAI-compatible transport.
